ASSIST_PURPOSES: to scoot to edge of surface
for pain management during UE ROM
for hip lift/bridging to clear clothing
for transition to stand to manage pants
to cross leg for foot access
to reach mouth for oral care
SESSION_CONTEXT_OPTIONS: Patient had pain medication 1 hour prior
Patient expressed motivation to return home
Patient demonstrated carryover from previous session
Patient forgot techniques from last session
CLINICAL_REASONING_OPTIONS: Graded task up to increase challenge
Graded task down due to fatigue
Modified approach due to pain complaints
Will progress to next level next session

Transfers: Decreased eccentric control during lowering phase, limiting safe controlled descent to surfaces
Retropulsion during standing phase, increasing fall risk during transfers
Decreased LE strength limiting ability to achieve standing without UE support
Decreased standing tolerance limiting time available for safe transfer completion
Impaired balance during positional transitions, requiring increased assistance for safety
Decreased safety awareness during transfers, requiring external cueing for safe technique
Decreased anterior weight shift limiting ability to achieve adequate forward lean for standing
Decreased hip extension limiting ability to achieve full upright standing posture
Decreased knee extension limiting ability to maintain stable standing position
Impaired motor planning affecting sequencing and timing of transfer components
Decreased trunk rotation limiting ability to pivot during stand-pivot transfers
Balance - Sitting: Decreased dynamic sitting balance limiting ability to reach outside base of support
Decreased static sitting balance requiring UE support for unsupported sitting
Decreased trunk control affecting ability to maintain upright posture during seated ADL
Decreased core strength limiting postural stability during seated functional tasks
Decreased lateral weight shift control limiting ability to reach to sides during seated tasks
Impaired righting reactions increasing fall risk during perturbations in sitting
Decreased postural awareness limiting ability to self-correct trunk position
Balance - Standing: Decreased dynamic standing balance limiting safe reaching during standing ADL
Decreased static standing balance requiring assistive device for safe standing
Decreased standing tolerance limiting duration of standing functional activities
Impaired reactive balance increasing fall risk during unexpected perturbations
Decreased lateral weight shift limiting ability to safely reach to sides in standing
Decreased LE strength limiting ability to maintain stable standing position
Decreased proprioceptive awareness affecting ability to sense body position in space
Bed Mobility: Decreased trunk strength limiting ability to transition from supine to sitting
Decreased LE strength limiting ability to assist with bed mobility tasks
Decreased UE strength limiting ability to push up from bed surface
Impaired motor sequencing affecting ability to complete bed mobility in correct order
Decreased activity tolerance limiting ability to complete full bed mobility routine
Decreased segmental rolling ability requiring log roll technique for positioning
Limited trunk rotation affecting ability to initiate rolling movements
Dressing: Decreased shoulder ROM limiting ability to reach overhead and behind back for dressing
Decreased UE strength limiting ability to manipulate clothing against gravity
Decreased fine motor coordination limiting ability to manage fasteners and fabric
Impaired sequencing affecting ability to complete dressing steps in correct order
Decreased sitting balance during dressing requiring UE support or supervision
Decreased activity tolerance limiting ability to complete full dressing routine
Decreased bilateral coordination limiting ability to manage garments requiring two hands
Bathing: Decreased standing tolerance limiting time available for shower/bathing tasks
Decreased dynamic standing balance limiting safe movement during shower tasks
Decreased UE ROM limiting ability to reach all body surfaces for washing
Decreased activity tolerance limiting ability to complete full bathing routine
Impaired sequencing affecting ability to complete bathing in safe, efficient order
Decreased safety awareness during bathing requiring supervision for safe task completion
Decreased functional reach limiting ability to access bathing supplies and body surfaces
Fear of falling limiting willingness to attempt bathing tasks independently
Grooming: Decreased shoulder ROM limiting ability to reach face and hair for grooming tasks
Decreased UE strength limiting ability to sustain grooming motions against gravity
Decreased fine motor coordination limiting ability to manipulate grooming tools
Decreased standing tolerance limiting time available for grooming at sink
Decreased activity tolerance limiting ability to complete full grooming routine
Impaired sequencing affecting ability to complete grooming in efficient order
Self-Feeding: Decreased shoulder ROM limiting ability to bring hand to mouth for feeding
Decreased UE strength limiting ability to lift utensils and sustain feeding motions
Decreased fine motor coordination limiting ability to manipulate utensils effectively
Decreased grasp strength limiting ability to maintain hold on utensils during feeding
Impaired hand-to-mouth control affecting accuracy of utensil placement
Decreased sitting balance limiting postural stability during feeding tasks
Intention tremors affecting accuracy of utensil control during self-feeding
Impaired in-hand manipulation limiting ability to adjust utensil position in hand
Toileting: Decreased transfer safety limiting ability to safely transfer on/off toilet
Decreased standing tolerance limiting time for clothing management at toilet
Decreased dynamic standing balance limiting safe clothing management in standing
Impaired clothing management limiting ability to manage garments for toileting
Decreased LE strength limiting ability to stand from toilet height surfaces
Impaired sequencing affecting ability to complete toileting routine in correct order

Decreased activity tolerance limiting ability to complete full meal preparation
Impaired sequencing affecting ability to follow recipe steps in correct order
Decreased safety awareness limiting safe use of kitchen appliances and sharp objects
Decreased problem-solving limiting ability to adapt when issues arise during cooking
Decreased bilateral coordination limiting ability to stabilize and manipulate items
Decreased functional reach limiting access to cabinets and work surfaces
Home Management: Decreased activity tolerance limiting ability to complete household tasks

Decreased functional mobility limiting ability to navigate home during tasks
Decreased bilateral coordination limiting ability to manage cleaning equipment
Decreased functional reach limiting ability to access storage areas
